themes.theme: US-Iran peace talks and Strait of Hormuz reopening proposal driving broad USD weakness and commodity volatility
Oil surging toward $100 on stalled US-Iran deal and Iranian storage limits, boosting commodity currencies and pressuring oil importers
Central bank super-week: BoJ hike signal, Fed leadership uncertainty, ECB/BoE decisions all in focus
JPY crosses bid as markets price BoJ June hike signal amid broad risk-on tone from geopolitical de-escalation hopes

key_observation: The USD is weakening despite surging oil prices and safe-haven flows into gold/silver, suggesting Fed leadership uncertainty and US-Iran peace hopes are overriding the traditional energy-shock dollar bid.
watch: BoJ policy decision this week — market positioning for a June hike signal could accelerate JPY strength and unwind carry trades if rhetoric turns hawkish, with USD/JPY 159.20 breakout zone as the pivotal level.
